channel.title: Astrid Wingler on DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments
channel.description: Recent content in Astrid Wingler on DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments

item.title: Global gene flow releases invasive plants from environmental constraints on genetic diversity
item.description: Abstract When plants establish outside their native range, their ability to adapt to the new environment is influenced by both demography and dispersal.
